name: SoftOx Solutions AS
summary: SoftOx Solutions AS, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a medtech company in Norway. Its SoftOx technology kills the microorganisms in biofilms by acting on various microbial components. The company engages in the development of SoftOx Wound Irrigation Solution that is under preclinical studies for the prevention and treatment of infections on breached or compromised skin, including acute wounds and skin lesions in patients with eczema; and SoftOx Biofilm Eradicator, which is in preclinical studies to treat biofilm infections in non-healing chronic wounds. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
